bookSourceComment: 使用 cirno-src reader-server 代理的 /reader-api。登录页会写入 /reader-auth session cookie。
loginUrl: var BASE=String(baseUrl||'http://127.0.0.1:3200').replace(/\/+$/,'');function hdr(){var h=new Packages.java.util.HashMap();h.put('Content-Type','application/json');h.put('Accept','application/json');return h;}function body(r){try{return r&&typeof r.body==='function'?r.body():(r&&r.body?r.body:r);}catch(e){return String(r||e);}}function parse(s){try{return JSON.parse(String(s||'{}'));}catch(e){return {error:String(s||e)};}}function req(method,path,obj){var url=BASE+path;var r=method==='post'?java.post(url,JSON.stringify(obj||{}),hdr()):java.ajax(url);return parse(body(r));}function value(name){try{var m=source.getLoginInfoMap();if(m&&m.get)return m.get(name)||'';}catch(e){}try{return result&&result.get?result.get(name):'';}catch(e){return '';}}function say(t){t=String(t||'');try{java.toast(t);}catch(e){}}function fmt(u){if(!u)return '未登录';var exp=u.membership_permanent?'永久':(u.membership_expires_at?String(u.membership_expires_at).replace('T',' ').replace(/\.\d+Z?$/,''):'未开通');var active=!!u.membership_permanent||(u.membership_expires_at&&new Date(u.membership_expires_at)>new Date());var access=(u.library_access!==false&&active)?'有效':'未开通或已到期';return (u.nickname||u.username||'用户')+' 权限:'+access+' 有效期:'+exp;}function login(){var username=String(value('用户名')).trim();var password=String(value('密码'));if(!username||!password)throw '请输入用户名和密码';var d=req('post','/reader-auth/login',{username:username,password:password});if(d.error)throw d.error;say('登录成功 '+fmt(d.user));}function queryStatus(){try{var d=req('get','/reader-auth/me');say(fmt(d.user));}catch(e){say('查询失败 '+e);}}function signIn(){try{var d=req('post','/reader-auth/sign',{});if(d.error)throw d.error;var r=d.reward||{};say('签到成功 铜币+'+(r.copper||0)+' 银币+'+(r.silver||0)+' 经验+'+(r.exp||0));}catch(e){say('签到失败 '+e);}}function logout(){try{req('post','/reader-auth/logout',{});}catch(e){}try{source.removeLoginInfo();source.removeLoginHeader();}catch(e){}say('已退出登录');}
loginUi: [{"name":"用户名","type":"text"},{"name":"密码","type":"password"},{"name":"查询有效期","type":"button","action":"queryStatus()"},{"name":"签到","type":"button","action":"signIn()"},{"name":"退出登录","type":"button","action":"logout()"}]
exploreUrl:
